message:
refactor(interactive): update session parameter to Arc<Mutex<Session>>

Follow-up to the SessionHandle thread-safety refactor. Updates the
interactive mode to work with the shared session:

Function signatures:
- run_interactive(): session parameter now Arc<Mutex<Session>>
- PiApp::new(): session parameter now Arc<Mutex<Session>>

Initialization:
- load_conversation_from_session() now acquires the session lock via
  try_lock() during PiApp initialization
- Uses expect() since we're in the constructor and the lock should
  always be available at this point

This ensures interactive mode is compatible with the thread-safe session
architecture that enables extensions to access session state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
